disclaimer: Honest self-assessment. NOT production-grade. Capped by 3 external Critical gates (real auth, TLS, external pen-test) + MSSQL production load, all operator/external-owned.
verdict: PILOT-grade, not production-grade. V3 adds real accounting depth (P&L + Balance Sheet, balanced), 15 data-driven CRUD modules (manufacturing/HR/POS/eCommerce/maintenance/customization skeletons), and 108 tests, lifting production readiness ~35%->~48%. The ceiling is hard: real authentication, TLS, an external security review, and MSSQL production load are operator/external-owned and cannot be produced locally; they cap the score until supplied. 100% is impossible locally for exactly these reasons.
